candidates.why: Valid overhead component, but incomplete on its own for SG&A coverage.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the main overhead row 'Staff costs'. No explicit SG&A total is present, so selected best overhead components: 'Staff costs' plus 'Share-Based Payments'. Included 'Research & Development' as well because it is separately reported and does not appear embedded in the selected overhead rows; this allows PROF to subtract XRD from SG&A properly. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs, [Income Statement] Research & Development
